tossups.question: To entertain a sick boy, the protagonist of this novel reads the book A Bishop among the Bantus and pretends it’s about pirates. Near the end of Chimamanda Adichie’s Americanah, when Ifemelu reunites with Obinze, they discuss this novel, his mother’s favorite. This novel’s protagonist is haunted by the signature “Dicky” on a suicide note and imagines the word “Ticki,” the pet name his wife calls him, in its place. During an interview in Chinua Achebe’s No Longer at Ease, Obi humorously says that this novel was ruined by its “happy ending.” In this novel, the (*) agent Wilson despises the protagonist for having an affair with Helen Rolt. Soon after his servant Ali is killed due to his dealings with the diamond smuggler Yusuf, the protagonist of this novel, a police officer, commits suicide. For 10 points, Major Henry Scobie is the protagonist of what novel by Graham Greene set in West Africa?

bonuses.leadin: This author’s fear that her house might have been burnt is reflected in the burning of Danielstown at the end of her novel Last September. For 10 points each:
parts: One novel of this author tells of the relationship between Portia, her half-brother Thomas and her adoptive mother Anna, who reads Portia’s diary and is angered to discover Portia observes her every move.

Portia Quayne is the protagonist of a Bowen novel that is entitled The Death of [this body part]. A novel by Graham Greene with the name of this body part in the title details Henry Scobie’s experiences in Freetown in Sierra Leone.
Last September is set during the war of independence of this country, where Bowen was born. Other novelists born in this country include Samuel Beckett and Flann O’Brien.
answers_sanitized: heart (accept The Heart of the Matter)

bonuses.leadin: This character pretends to be the father of a dying girl after a shipwreck in order to calm her in her last moments. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this British military officer, a devout Catholic who commits suicide rather than renounce his affair with Helen. His wife Louise is told that nobody can know a man’s heart or God’s mercy when she tries to rationalize this man’s death.
Major Scobie is the main character of this novel, in which he searches ships such as the Portuguese Esperança for smuggled diamonds and deals with the black market trader Yusef.
The Heart of the Matter was written by this English author who wrote The End of the Affair and The Power and the Glory.
